name: MCAZ premises licence
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Licence for premises dealing in medicines, issued by the Medicines Control Authority of Zimbabwe; the public register is searchable online.

name: Central hospital
notes: Source URLs inherited from the Zimbabwe Black Book dataset (record lastReviewed 2026-07-15); not independently re-fetched in this revision.
definition: Top-tier public referral hospitals listed in the Ministry of Health directory (for example Parirenyatwa Group of Hospitals).

name: Funder / medical aid
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A medical-aid society or insurer paying provider claims on behalf of members; regulation is a declared research gap.

name: Shortfall
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The gap between the provider's charge and the funder tariff, billed to the patient.

name: Tariff
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: The negotiated or published price per service code used in funder claims.

name: Locum / sessional
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A professional engaged per session rather than salaried; paid through payroll or supplier billing by arrangement.

name: FEFO
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: First-expiry-first-out stock rotation used for medicines.

name: Dispensing
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Supplying medicines against a prescription from licensed premises.

name: Encounter
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: A single patient visit or service episode; the billing unit for most practices.

name: Panel / corporate patient
notes: Common trade usage recorded for product design; not sourced from an official publication.
definition: Patients billed to an employer or scheme under a bulk arrangement.
